svg.title: Sub-H Lid Snap Detent Ridges — Engineering Drawing
svg.text: 8 Ridges on Tray Interior Side Walls — Third-Angle Orthographic Projection
Material: PETG | All dimensions in mm | Ridges are integral to tray walls (Sub-A)

g.text: 1. All 8 ridges are identical in cross-section (mirrored left/right about X=80 mm).
2. Ridges are printed integral with tray side walls — no assembly required.
3. Ridge profile is a uniform extrusion along Y (prismatic, 6 mm long).
4. The 45-degree ramp requires no support material (at FDM support threshold).
5. Ridge positions: Y = 20, 60, 100, 140 mm (center), 40 mm spacing, symmetric L/R.
6. Mating feature: lid snap tabs (not shown) deflect 1.0 mm outward to clear ridge peaks.
7. Catch face (B-D edge) is vertical — provides positive retention against +Z lid lift.
ID Wall X face (mm) Y center (mm) Y range (mm) Z peak (mm)
